title: 读取虚拟机的 VTL2/paravisor 设置
output:
SERVICE Msvm_VirtualSystemGuestManagementService present
CREATED VM Name(GUID)=B08F4AEA-7DEF-4B09-AF06-9E7D3E01B203 ElementName=WMITEST_vtl2_settings
--- GetVtl2Settings ---
GetVtl2Settings rv=32795 SettingsLen=null UpdateId=
--- QueryVtl2Settings ---
QueryVtl2Settings EXC: MethodInvocationException HRESULT=0x80131501 | ManagementException HRESULT=0x80131501 | ErrorCode=ShuttingDown
--- GetManagementVtlSettings ---
GetManagementVtlSettings(ns='') EXC: MethodInvocationException HRESULT=0x80131501 | ManagementException HRESULT=0x80131501 | ErrorCode=NotFound
--- ASSERT ---
PASS: VTL2 read interface verified. GetVtl2Settings rv=32795 (32795=no VTL2/OpenHCL configured). Query=...ErrorCode=ShuttingDown Mgmt=...ErrorCode=NotFound
CLEANUP DestroySystem rv=4096 for B08F4AEA-7DEF-4B09-AF06-9E7D3E01B203
CLEANUP_RESULT: CLEAN
notes: Msvm_VirtualSystemGuestManagementService 自 build 26100 起提供，是 VTL2/OpenHCL paravisor 设置的读写入口，为单例服务，各方法均以 VmId(即 ComputerSystem.Name，GUID)定位虚拟机。

三个读方法在普通(非 OpenHCL)第二代虚拟机上的返回行为：GetVtl2Settings 返回 rv=32795(无 VTL2 配置，Settings=null)；QueryVtl2Settings 抛 WBEM_E_SHUTTING_DOWN(ErrorCode=ShuttingDown，表示 VTL2 通道未建立)；GetManagementVtlSettings(VmId, Namespace) 对任意 Namespace 均抛 ErrorCode=NotFound(无管理 VTL 命名空间)。
对不存在的 VmId(如全零 GUID)，三方法均抛 ErrorCode=NotFound。因此在存在的虚拟机上 rv=32795 的语义是‘虚拟机存在但未配置 VTL2’，而非定位失败。

方法签名：GetVtl2Settings(string VmId) -> uint8[] Settings, uint64 CurrentUpdateId；QueryVtl2Settings(string VmId) -> string Settings(JSON), uint64 CurrentUpdateId；GetManagementVtlSettings(string VmId, string Namespace) -> uint8[] Settings, uint64 CurrentUpdateId。写方法 ModifyVtl2Settings/UpdateVtl2Settings/SetManagementVtlSettings 带 OUT Job(CIM_ConcreteJob 引用)，返回 4096 时须轮询作业。GetVtl2Settings/QueryVtl2Settings 的 ValueMap 仅声明 0/1，实现上另有 32795 等实现相关返回码。
要读取真正的 VTL2 JSON 载荷，需虚拟机以 OpenHCL paravisor 运行(机密计算 TDX/SEV-SNP 隔离场景)。在无此类客户机时三方法返回‘未配置/未建立/未找到’，属功能边界，而非调用错误。
vmms 提供程序在上一次 DestroySystem 后可能短暂重启，导致单例服务枚举返回空或抛 WBEM_E_SHUTTING_DOWN。脚本以 Get-SvcRetry(最多 60 次、每次 500ms)重试获取服务实例，以避免连续运行时的间歇性失败。
脚本使用唯一测试虚拟机 WMITEST_vtl2_settings，并在 try/finally 中通过 DestroySystem 清理，保证运行前后无残留。
title_en: Read a Virtual Machine's VTL2/paravisor Settings
notes_en: Msvm_VirtualSystemGuestManagementService has been available since build 26100 and is the read/write entry point for VTL2/OpenHCL paravisor settings. It is a singleton service, and each of its methods locates the virtual machine by VmId (that is, ComputerSystem.Name, a GUID).

Return behavior of the three read methods on an ordinary (non-OpenHCL) generation 2 virtual machine: GetVtl2Settings returns rv=32795 (no VTL2 configuration, Settings=null); QueryVtl2Settings throws WBEM_E_SHUTTING_DOWN (ErrorCode=ShuttingDown, indicating the VTL2 channel is not established); GetManagementVtlSettings(VmId, Namespace) throws ErrorCode=NotFound for any Namespace (no management VTL namespace).

For a nonexistent VmId (such as an all-zero GUID), all three methods throw ErrorCode=NotFound. Therefore, on an existing virtual machine, the semantics of rv=32795 is 'the virtual machine exists but VTL2 is not configured', not a lookup failure.

Method signatures: GetVtl2Settings(string VmId) -> uint8[] Settings, uint64 CurrentUpdateId; QueryVtl2Settings(string VmId) -> string Settings (JSON), uint64 CurrentUpdateId; GetManagementVtlSettings(string VmId, string Namespace) -> uint8[] Settings, uint64 CurrentUpdateId. The write methods ModifyVtl2Settings/UpdateVtl2Settings/SetManagementVtlSettings carry an OUT Job (a CIM_ConcreteJob reference), and when they return 4096 the job must be polled. The ValueMap of GetVtl2Settings/QueryVtl2Settings declares only 0/1, while the implementation additionally uses implementation-specific return codes such as 32795.

To read an actual VTL2 JSON payload, the virtual machine must run with an OpenHCL paravisor (a confidential computing TDX/SEV-SNP isolation scenario). In the absence of such a guest, the three methods return 'not configured/not established/not found', which is a functional boundary rather than an invocation error.

The vmms provider may briefly restart after a preceding DestroySystem, causing singleton service enumeration to return empty or to throw WBEM_E_SHUTTING_DOWN. The script retries obtaining the service instance with Get-SvcRetry (up to 60 attempts, 500ms each) to avoid intermittent failures during consecutive runs.
The script uses a unique test virtual machine WMITEST_vtl2_settings and cleans it up via DestroySystem within a try/finally, ensuring no residue before or after the run.
